name: TypeScript + React project (happy path)
description: Standard TypeScript + React project with Prettier. Tests the primary workflow end-to-end.
expected_behavior: Runs tiered analysis: parallel Glob calls -> compress via summarize_structure.py -> config read -> targeted grep
Detects TypeScript + React as primary language/framework from package.json dependencies
Detects Prettier from .prettierrc and defers formatting rules to it
Generates code-style.md WITHOUT frontmatter, with 'Defer to Prettier' for formatting rules
Generates testing.md with paths scoped to '"src/**/*.test.{ts,tsx}"'
Generates api-design.md with paths scoped to API directories only (src/api/**/*.ts), excluding .tsx
Presents generation plan to user and waits for confirmation before writing any files
All generated files include correct frontmatter (where applicable), metadata comment, and section markers
Runs validate_rules.py on generated files and all pass
